$comment: Schema for .bip-history.json — per-project post history. Tracks posts, context lines used, topics covered, and edit diffs for voice evolution.

posts.topic: one-line summary of what the post is about
posts.context_line: the one-line project context used in this post
posts.session_source: session id or filename this post was drawn from
posts.draft_text: original AI draft text before user edits
posts.was_edited: true | false — whether user modified the draft
posts.diff_processed: false — set to true after voice evolution loop processes the diff

context_lines_used: built a gamified personal OS with claude
building a system where breaking a streak gives you 2x xp
topics_covered: streak was 0 despite days of building
voice agent setup with wake word
